idea-plugin.name: Sidebar Terminal
idea-plugin.description: Adds a standalone terminal tool window docked to the right sidebar (next to Database), which runs a configurable command on startup. Configure the command in Settings | Tools | Sidebar Terminal.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.4.0
  • Multiple terminal tabs: use the + button in the tool window title bar; tabs are closeable, each runs the startup command in its own shell
0.3.0
  • Esc is now reliably delivered to the terminal (intercepted at the IDE event queue level) instead of moving focus back to the editor
0.2.0
  • Default startup command is now claude
